2026

May

WhatsApp Integration

New

Connect your WhatsApp Business account with Zoho Projects to send real-time updates to your customers. This works across modules supported in workflow rules, including custom modules.

Read More

User Custom Fields and Revamped UI

Zoho Projects now supports user custom fields. These fields can be used to capture more information about a user and customize the user invite form as well.

Read More

Field Level Permission for Time Logs

Enhancements

Field level permissions are available for time logs. Control access to minute details in time logs to maintain accuracy and security.

Read More

Apr

Custom Modules Support in Zoho Projects Mobile Apps

Mobile App

Custom Modules in Zoho Projects are now available in both Android and iOS apps allowing users to capture specific data and tailor it to unique business processes while on the move.

Read More
